name: zvid_selected_hw_api_description
description: zVid selected hardware API description accessor returns the selected record's driver-description buffer or the default string when no hardware API record is selected.
known_limits: No known functional limits. The native smoke verifies null-selected fallback and selected-record buffer identity for zVid::GetSelectedHwApiDescriptionOrDefault.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?GetSelectedHwApiDescriptionOrDefault@zVid@@YAPADXZ at 0x4a7410 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
